description: Contact Router Security — Tenant Isolation Fixes. CRITICAL: (1) search procedure has no createTenantWhereClause — cross-tenant search by name/email (R-02). (2) logActivity transaction uses raw ctx.prisma with no tenantId in WHERE — cross-tenant update (R-03). (3) bulkEmail/bulkExport no tenant filter — email exfiltration via guessed UUIDs (R-04). (4) stats ignores typedCtx tenant — no tenantId boundary (R-05). (5) getById/getByEmail double-fetch through unscoped domain repo (R-06). Cross-ref: R-01 (prismaWithTenant raw) is cross-cutting and shared with IFC-237. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §15.

validations.name: Task completion verification
validations.notes: Task marked as completed in Sprint_plan.csv

notes: Contact audit finding: R-02,R-03,R-04,R-05,R-06. See docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md
